pub struct SpokesResponse {
    pub spokes: Vec<DashboardSpokeInfo>,
    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
    pub warning: Option<String>,
}
struct DockerContainer {
    #[serde(default)]
    names: Vec<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    state: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    status: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    created: i64,
    #[serde(default)]
    labels: HashMap<String, String>,
}
